content_body:
The employees at Cabin Rentals of Georgia, were extremely nice, helpful, and accommodating to all of our wants and needs. Taylor at CROG ensured that the check-in process was smooth so that we could get settled in to our cabin right away. She also responded promptly to my after hours questions/concerns.

Additionally, I thought that my group left some clothes at the cabin we stayed at, and I was easily able to text Taylor on my drive back home after leaving the cabin, and she personally went to the cabin we stayed in and checked the premises for the clothes that I thought we accidentally left at the cabin. The CROG team/Taylor get 5 stars from me, and I will certainly use them to book a cabin the next time that I am visiting the Blue Ridge Mountains!!!
title: Extremely Helpful Company and Wonderful Experience
